tagline: RFK/Trump misunderstand vaccines and their power to save lives. The champion of free speech stays silent on ADA censorship.

hero.title: President Trump’s Childhood Vaccine Schedule
hero.author: Paul Offit, MD
hero.excerpt: Donald Trump recently issued two executive orders claiming that children in the United States are receiving too many vaccines.
hero.brief:
- Trump's EOs claim kids get too many vaccines today vs. 1980.
- Reality: smallpox vaccine alone had more immune components than all 17 today's vaccines combined.
- More vaccines = fewer deaths.

selected.title: OMB is Waging a Disinformation Campaign
selected.author: Elizabeth Ginexi, PhD
selected.excerpt: They are Lying About the Reasons for Changing OMB’s Federal Financial Assistance Rule
selected.brief:
- OMB justifies its grant rule with fabricated talking points: "drag shows in Ecuador," "transgender mice."
- Both lies trace to Heritage/Rand Paul.
- Disinformation rewriting $1.1T in grants.

selected.title: Will NIH Director Jay Bhattacharya stand up for scientists censored by the American Diabetes Association?
selected.author: David Gorski, MD, PhD
selected.excerpt: Last Friday, the American Diabetes Association censored diabetes researchers at its annual meeting who opposed the Trump administration's NIH policies. Will "Flame of Freedom" winner Jay Bhattcharya speak up? The post Will NIH Director Jay Bhattacharya stand up for scientists censored by the American Diabetes Associati
selected.brief:
- ADA had police eject top diabetes researchers for handing out a Diabetes Care editorial critical of Trump NIH cuts.
- Bhattacharya, scheduled to speak, was a no-show.
- "Flame of Freedom" winner stays silent.

selected.title: DOJ Charges NIH Virologists for Transporting Inactive Virus
selected.author: Bob Morris, MD, PhD
selected.excerpt: Monkeypox Researchers Charged with Semantics Violation
selected.brief:
- DOJ charged two NIH virologists with "smuggling" monkeypox.
- FBI testing found only inactivated virus, incapable of causing disease.
- Real offense: calling harmless samples "diagnostic equipment" to a customs agent.

selected.title: Federal charges, international isolation, ideological purges and the administration's plan to create regime scientists in the US
selected.author: Philip Markolin, PhD
selected.excerpt: I wish this wasn't a real headline either
selected.brief:
DOJ press releases against foreign-born scientists echo lab-leak conspiracy framing.
Eastern Michigan US Attorney leads the spree.
OMB rule layers on political control. Get on board or get out.

selected.title: The COVID Amnesia Project: Erasing Your Free Will to Preserve the Fantasy of the Optional Pandemic
selected.author: Jonathan Howard, MD
selected.excerpt: Countless millions of Americans prioritized their health and protecting their neighbors over an imagined return to normal in 2020. Our sacrifices deserve recognition and gratitude, not amnesia and revisionist history from sheltered political scientists. The post The COVID Amnesia Project: Erasing Your Free Will to Pres
selected.brief:
- Revisionists pretend 2020 normalcy was possible if only leaders had said so.
- Reality: COVID killed 1000s of young Americans; people avoided it on their own.
- Their sacrifices deserve gratitude, not erasure.

selected.title: Chair of President’s Cancer Panel Co-Authors Ivermectin Cancer Study Backed By Supplements Company
selected.author: Walker Bragman
selected.brief:
-Harvey Risch joins the Wellness Company
Unproven treatment at inconsistent doses with no controls
-Patients, never examined, had a dozen different cancer types, many on conventional treatment
-Marketing disguised as research

recent.title: Senate HSGAC Itty Bitty Turbo Cancer Subcommittee Hearing
recent.author: Angela Rasmussen, PhD
recent.excerpt: Sorry about the echo but I think it makes it seem more like the circus it was
recent.brief:
- Sen. Ron Johnson's HSGAC subcommittee staged a fact-free anti-vax circus on "turbo cancer."
- Witnesses included Dalgleish, Hazan, Malhotra.
- Blumenthal brought actual oncology evidence.

recent.title: Minerals, deportations, and medicine. Inside Trump’s bilateral health agreements.
recent.author: Celine Gounder, MD
recent.sourceName: What I can and Can't Say on TV
recent.excerpt: The Trump administration signed bilateral health deals with over 30 countries. Public records show who donated, who benefited, and what happened to countries that refused.
recent.brief:
Trump's Graft and Extortion Racquet Comes for Public Health
-Trump signed bilateral health deals with 32 countries, worth $20.3B.
-Deals tied to tariffs, deportations & mineral access.
-Inaugural donors hold business in recipient nations.
-Countries that refused lost funding.

recent.title: In Animal Study, Nanobots Repair Spinal Cords
recent.author: Steven Novella, MD
recent.excerpt: For my entire career as a neurologist the ability to repair an injured spinal cord has been one of the holy grails. There has always been promising new research that definitely increases our knowledge but doesn’t lead to an effective treatment. This is not for lack of trying – I also remember the period when Christophe

recent.title: Scoop: HHS asks confined hantavirus cruise passengers to assist in propaganda.
recent.author: Jeremy Faust, MD
recent.excerpt: The US Department of Health and Human Services invited the Andes hantavirus-exposed former MV Hondius cruise ship passengers staying in a National Quarantine Unit in Nebraska to participate in some free government propaganda.
recent.brief:
From Lockdown Hate to Quarantine Lovefest
-HHS asked hantavirus-exposed MV Hondius passengers in Nebraska quarantine to share "fun" room photos.
-Passengers still face 42-day monitoring.
-Stunt undermines the seriousness of biosecurity.

recent.title: This new OMB Rule Is Bigger Than Science. Much Bigger.
recent.author: Elizabeth Ginexi, PhD
recent.excerpt: This image was generated by Google AI (Gemini)
recent.brief:
-OMB's proposed rewrite of 2 CFR Part 200 covers ALL federal grants, not just science.
-$1.1T in state/local funding at risk: Medicaid, transit, education, food aid.
-Comment by July 13.
